title: False-positive from "PRAGMA integrity_check"
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE Table1 (col VARCHAR NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY, col2 INTEGER DEFAULT 0);
CREATE TABLE db2.Table2(col1 INTEGER NOT NULL, col2 VARCHAR, col3 FLOAT, col4 BLOB, UNIQUE(col1, col2));
INSERT INTO db2.Table2 (col1, col2, col3, col4) VALUES(1, 'test', 3.14, X'001122');
key_bug_features: PRAGMA integrity_check with attached databases causes false-positive errors
